title: Man Accused of Plotting to Kill Trump Blames Iran for Scheme
summary_full: Asif Merchant testified in his own defense, saying he participated in the plot to protect his family in Iran. Prosecutors reject his account of his motives.
summary_public: Asif Merchant testified in his own defense, saying he participated in the plot to protect his family in Iran. Prosecutors reject his account of his motives.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: accused of plotting to kill Trump blames Iran for scheme
